name: IpGetAdapterMask
title: IpGetAdapterMask
syntax: long IpGetAdapterMask( dword ifIndex, dword mask[], dword maskSize); // form 1
long IpGetAdapterMask( dword ifIndex, IP_Address addressMasks[], dword &count); // form 2
description: The function retrieves the address masks (subnet masks) associated with the specified network interface.

parameters.name: ifIndex
parameters.description: The 1-based network interface index. All adapter addresses including the local loopback address are taken into account in the stack of the operating system. The order depends on how the operating system lists the adapters.All assigned addresses including the VLAN addresses are taken into account in the CANoe stack.

parameters.name: maskSize
parameters.description: The size of the mask array.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The size of the mask array.

parameters.name: mask
parameters.description: The array used to store the numerical IPv4 address masks.

parameters.name: addressMasks
parameters.description: Address masks are copied to this array.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
